CARGO_PILE.title: Cargo Pile
CARGO_PILE.description:
At the start of each turn,
an extra card is drawn from here.

Click to view the cards in your Cargo pile (in order).
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LOAD_AMMO.title: Ammo
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LOAD_AMMO.description: Loading [gold]Ammo[/gold] increases your ammo stockpile. [gold]Ammo[/gold] may be fired at any time for {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, dealing 12 damage to a random enemy (scaling with your [gold]Strength[/gold]).
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-AMMO_BUTTON.title: Shot
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-AMMO_BUTTON.descriptio: Deal {Damage} damage to a random enemy.
